text:

Log:
  deskutils/ical: unbreak with libc++ 3.9

  calfile.C:63:11: error: cannot initialize a variable of type 'char *' with an rvalue of type
        'const char *'
      char* lastSlash = strrchr(name, '/');
            ^           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

  Reported by:	antoine (via exp-run)
